mapper.select: select p.* from sys_permission p left join sys_role_permission_relation r on p.permission_id = r.permission_id where r.role_id = #{roleId}

select distinct p.* from sys_permission p left join sys_role_permission_relation rp on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id left join sys_user_role_relation ur on ur.role_id = rp.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct p.* from sys_permission p join sys_role_permission_relation rp on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id join sys_user_role_relation ur on rp.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and type in (0, 1) order by p.sort
